name: Allegro
summary: Planned Allegro connector for offer, order and publication-error monitoring when a seller needs direct marketplace control outside BaseLinker.
description: Added as a planned connector because Marketing identifies direct marketplace control as a high-value fallback when a seller does not use BaseLinker or needs marketplace-native diagnostics. Allegro documents an API for exchanging information with external software such as warehouse or accounting systems and uses OAuth flows. Build should start only after a customer validates the direct-Allegro use case and required scopes.
useCases: Validate publication errors and offer status directly in Allegro.
Read order events for sellers who do not use BaseLinker.
Dry-run stock or price changes before writing to live offers.
requires: seller consent and scoped access token
